reasoning: The PCI DSS 3.4.1 control focuses on encryption and logging, which are directly applicable to Kubernetes through the encryption of secrets and etcd, as well as enabling audit logging. Kubernetes provides mechanisms to encrypt secrets at rest and etcd, ensuring sensitive data is protected. Additionally, Kubernetes audit logging can be configured to ensure that all access and changes are logged, supporting compliance with audit requirements.
title: Requirement 3.4.1
